Exciting news! The Nagaland State Lottery Department has just announced the results for the 6 pm Dear Lottery Chart Today Live Sambad. It’s your chance to check if fortune has smiled on you today.

In this Lottery Sambad Today 6 pm Result, there are fantastic prizes up for grabs. The 1st prize is a whopping 1 crore rupees, and there’s also the 2nd Prize of 9000 Rupees, the 3rd Prize of 450 Rupees, the 4th Prize of 250 Rupees, and the 5th Prize of 120 Rupees.

Dear Lottery Result Today 8 PM

Finally, The Wait is Now OVER! The Nagaland State Lottery Department has just unveiled the results for the 8 pm Dear Chart. It’s time to find out if today’s luck is on your side.

In this Today’s Dear Lottery Result at 8 pm, there are some fantastic prizes to be won. The 1st prize is a whopping 1 crore lottery rupees. Additionally, there’s the 2nd Prize of 9000 Rupees, the 3rd Prize of 450 Rupees, the 4th Prize of 250 Rupees, and the 5th Prize of 120 Rupees.

Dear Lottery Result Prize

Nagaland State Lotteries, established in 1972 under the Finance Department’s guidance, serves as a crucial revenue source for the State Government. They conduct daily lotteries at three different times: Morning, Day, and Evening. Each day, these lotteries go by other names, offering varying prize amounts, with the top prize reaching ₹1 Crore, inclusive of a Super Prize. The daily lotteries, namely Dear Morning, Dear Day, and Dear Evening, are accessible at just ₹6 per ticket.

Dear Result Timetable Nagaland

Lotteries’ Legal Status in India

  • In India, 13 states have made playing and organizing lottery games legal.
  • Nagaland is one of these states where lotteries have been legal since 1967.
  • The other 12 states include Assam, Mizoram, Kerala, Meghalaya, Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Goa, Maharashtra, Madhya Pradesh, Punjab, West Bengal, and Sikkim.
  • The results of these lotteries are published in Dear Lottery Chart, Dhankesari, and the Official Government Gazette.

Nagaland State Lottery: Key Information

  • Lottery draws are held at P. R. Hill Junction, Kohima – 797001.
  • The Director of Nagaland State Lotteries manages and organizes these lotteries.
  • To claim your prize, you need your undamaged ticket and a copy of the lottery claim form.
  • Also, attach a government-recognized Photo ID and passport-size photos with the claim form.
  • Remember, damaged tickets won’t be accepted.
  • The distributor can make payments of up to ₹10,000 on behalf of the State Government.
  • For claims exceeding ₹10,000, please submit them to the Director, Government of Nagaland, or the Nodal Office in your state within 30 days from the draw date.
  • Use the provided claim format along with the original winning ticket, adequately signed by you, and the necessary documents to receive your payment within 60 days.

Nagaland State Dear Lottery Result Today

The Nagaland State Dear Lottery Sambad online is a popular lottery program run by the government of Nagaland, a northeastern Indian state. This lottery was created to raise funds for the state and support various development projects. Let’s take a closer look at the Nagaland State Lottery:

  1. Different Types of Lotteries: The Nagaland State Dear Result offers a variety of lotteries, including Dear Morning, Dear Day, Dear Evening, Dear Night, and Bumper lotteries. Each lottery has its own set of prizes and ticket prices, giving people choices.
  2. Getting Tickets: You can buy lottery tickets for the online Dear Lottery Live from authorized retailers in Nagaland or online, if available. These tickets are reasonably priced, so many people can afford them.
  3. Prizes: The Nagaland State Dear Chart has different prize structures for each lottery. Each one has multiple prize levels with varying cash rewards. The biggest prize is usually called the “first prize” or “jackpot.”
  4. Drawing Schedule: The lottery draws happen at specific times for each type of lottery. The results are announced through newspapers, official websites, and local TV channels.
  5. Using the Money: The money generated from the Nagaland State Dear লটারি is used to support various projects in Nagaland. These projects can include building infrastructure, improving education, healthcare, and other programs that help the people of Nagaland.
  6. Is it Legal and Regulated?: Yes, the Nagaland State Dear Lottery Sambad is a legal and regulated program authorized by the Nagaland government. It operates under the Nagaland State Lotteries (Regulation) Act and is supervised by the Nagaland State Lotteries Department.
  7. Play Responsibly: Just like any lottery, the Dear লটারি online Nagaland encourages responsible gaming. Players are advised to stay within their budget and have a healthy attitude towards playing the lottery. There are age restrictions and other measures in place to protect vulnerable individuals and ensure the lottery program is fair.
